title: Department Manager Vacancy at Marks & Spencer India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Marks & Spencer India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!
